description: Multi-output conditional split — emit each output asset with rows matching its predicate. Equivalent to ADF Conditional Split / Informatica Router.

routes.label: Routes
routes.description: List of {asset_name, condition} dicts. Conditions evaluated in order; non-matching rows go to default route if set.

default_asset_name.label: Default Asset Name
default_asset_name.description: Name for the catch-all asset (rows that didn't match any condition)

exclusive.label: Exclusive
exclusive.description: If True, each row goes to exactly one route (first match). If False, a row may appear in multiple routes (overlapping conditions).
